metadata.name: Inform Customer of a Production Delay

description: A production delay means a customer's order will be late. A sales rep needs to proactively inform the customer.

nodes.task_description: Identify the sales order affected by the production delay.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the relevant sales order.

nodes.task_description: Get the revised estimated completion date from the production planning team.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives a new ETA for the order.

nodes.task_description: Contact the customer, explain the situation, provide the new ETA, and apologize for the delay.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly and proactively communicates the delay to the customer.
